no: Installed (3 components). Added from WeiDU.log scan.
sum: Everyone has their crap mod--Goo, Alassa, The Circle, The Darkest Day--and this is mine. The two quests really aren't all that bad. Not really. Well, not too much. If you install the Summon Cow spell restoration component, however, you should be ashamed of yourself. Really.

co.no: The Price of Friendship: quest about loyalty and sacrifice.

co.n: Some of My Best Friends Are Slimes
co.tp2n: Some of My Best Friends Are Slimes
co.no: Some of My Best Friends Are Slimes: comedic ooze quest.

co.n: You Could Restore the Summon Cow Spell, But Why?
co.tp2n: You Could Restore the Summon Cow Spell, But Why?
co.no: Humorous quest about the Summon Cow spell.
